info.title: AnchorPoint API
info.description: AnchorPoint Backend API for Stellar SEP-24 Anchor Operations

bearerAuth.description: JWT authorization token obtained from /auth/token endpoint

tags.name: SEP-24
tags.description: Stellar SEP-24 deposit and withdrawal operations

tags.name: Batch Payments
tags.description: Batch payment operations for reducing Stellar network fees

get.description: Fetches the downline referral hierarchy for the authenticated user using a recursive CTE.
Fetches transaction history for the authenticated user with pagination support.

parameters.name: assetCode
parameters.description: Filter transactions by asset code (e.g., USDC, BTC)

parameters.name: sender
parameters.description: Search for transactions with matching sender metadata in indexed events

parameters.name: receiver
parameters.description: Search for transactions with matching receiver metadata in indexed events

parameters.name: memo
parameters.description: Search for transactions by memo or indexed event text

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing authentication token

post.description: Validates and submits a pre-signed Stellar transaction XDR to the network.
SEP-24 Interactive Deposit Endpoint. Returns a URL for the user to complete KYC/Deposit.

asset_code.description: Asset code to deposit (e.g., USDC, USD, BTC, ETH)

url.description: URL for user to complete deposit

post.description: SEP-24 Interactive Withdraw Endpoint. Returns a URL for the user to complete KYC/Withdraw.

asset_code.description: Asset code to withdraw (e.g., USDC, USD, BTC, ETH)

url.description: URL for user to complete withdrawal

post.summary: Request a pre-signed URL for direct file upload
Confirm a direct file upload was completed
Webhook for 3rd party KYC provider updates
Submit a token approval request with signature
post.description: The relayer verifies the signature and submits the transaction on behalf of the user

spenderPublicKey.description: The spender's public key (address being approved)

nonce.description: Unique nonce to prevent replay attacks

expiry.description: Unix timestamp when the request expires

signature.description: Base64 encoded signature of the approval message

400.description: Invalid request or signature verification failed

post.description: Pre-verification of signature before submission
Submit a transaction that's already signed by the user

get.summary: Generate a nonce for approval requests
get.description: Returns a unique nonce to prevent replay attacks
Returns public relayer configuration (excludes sensitive data)

post.summary: Add a new job to the queue
post.description: Creates a new job for contract interaction
Creates an urgent settlement job
Creates a job to call a smart contract function

get.description: Retrieves the current status of a job
Retrieves jobs with a specific status
Retrieves all jobs created by the authenticated user

post.description: Queues a failed job for retry
Cancels a pending or active job

get.description: Retrieves queue statistics and metrics

post.description: Removes old completed and failed jobs

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Remove jobs older than this many days

post.description: Creates a new multisig transaction that requires signatures from multiple parties

requiredSigners.description: Array of public keys that must sign

get.summary: Get multisig transactions for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves all multisig transactions where the user is a required signer

post.summary: Add a signature to a multisig transaction
post.description: Adds the authenticated user's signature to a pending multisig transaction

get.summary: Get a multisig transaction by ID
get.description: Retrieves details of a specific multisig transaction
Retrieves all pending multisig transactions that need the user's signature

post.description: Manually submits a transaction that has reached the signature threshold

400.description: Invalid request or transaction not ready

get.summary: Get notifications for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves all notifications related to multisig transactions

parameters.name: unreadOnly
parameters.description: Filter to show only unread notifications

post.description: Marks specified notifications as read

get.description: Returns stellar.toml information in JSON or TOML format. Supports both JSON and TOML responses based on Accept header or format query parameter.
Returns current Stellar network fee stats including surge status and percentile fees.
Returns an estimated fee for a transaction with the given number of operations.

parameters.name: operations
parameters.description: Number of operations in the transaction

get.description: Returns the calculated fee for a given asset and amount using the asset's configured fee strategy.
Generates a daily fee report for anchor operations

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date for the report (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

get.description: Generates a monthly fee report for anchor operations

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year for the report. Defaults to current year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month for the report (1-12). Defaults to current month.

get.description: Exports a daily fee report as JSON or PDF file

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date for the report (YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today.

get.description: Exports a monthly fee report as JSON or PDF file

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year for the report. Defaults to current year.

parameters.name: month
parameters.description: Month for the report (1-12). Defaults to current month.

get.description: Retrieves historical fee reports

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of reports to return

get.description: Retrieve a history of indexed events from AnchorPoint contracts
Returns the current health of the event indexer, including last synced block and gap to ledger tip

lastSyncedBlock.description: The last block number synced to the database

ledgerTip.description: The current ledger tip from the blockchain

gap.description: The gap between local DB and ledger tip

isHealthy.description: Whether the indexer is considered healthy (gap < 1000 blocks)

get.description: Retrieves the current active dynamic configuration for the backend. Requires an API key with appropriate permissions (usually admin tier, but for now uses general API Key auth).

post.description: Updates the dynamic configuration, bumping the version and broadcasting the change to other instances.

schema.description: The new configuration settings (must pass validation)

get.description: Retrieves past configuration versions (up to 20).

post.description: Reverts the configuration to a specific previous version.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version number to rollback to

post.description: Generates a SEP-10 challenge transaction for client authentication with multi-key support

signers.description: List of signers for multi-key authentication

post.description: Validates a signed challenge transaction and returns a JWT token with multi-key support
Refreshes an existing valid JWT token

get.summary: Get all transactions with pagination (Admin only)

get.description: Welcome message for the AnchorPoint API
Check if the API server is running
Interactive Swagger UI documentation for the AnchorPoint API
